_doc: Monitored source groups displayed on the news page. Candidate collection is implemented in scripts/fetch-news-candidates.mjs; published items still require manual review in src/data/curated-news.json.

description.en: OpenHW GitHub releases and commit activity, plus OpenHW / Eclipse announcements.
description.zh: 跟踪 OpenHW GitHub 发布与提交活动，以及 OpenHW / Eclipse 官方公告。

description.en: Official updates from RISC-V International and FOSSi Foundation.
description.zh: 跟踪 RISC-V International 与 FOSSi Foundation 的官方动态。

description.en: CHIPS Alliance posts and project releases, including Caliptra, VeeR, Topwrap, and SV tooling.
description.zh: 跟踪 CHIPS Alliance 文章和项目发布，包括 Caliptra、VeeR、Topwrap 与 SystemVerilog 工具。

title.zh: 开放 EDA 与验证工具

description.en: Release candidates from Yosys, Verilator, OpenROAD, OpenLane, and cocotb.
description.zh: 跟踪 Yosys、Verilator、OpenROAD、OpenLane 与 cocotb 的发布候选。

description.en: OpenTitan, Caliptra, Keystone, CHERI-related lowRISC updates, and SoC/IP construction news.
description.zh: 跟踪 OpenTitan、Caliptra、Keystone、lowRISC CHERI 相关动态，以及 SoC/IP 构建新闻。
